title: lilium wilsonii
intro: Lilium wilsonii, also known as Wilson's lily, is a species of lily native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, while its flowers and bulbs are used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices. Additionally, Lilium wilsonii is used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
